lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸੋ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੋਈ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo antar so baahar dekhahu avar na doojaa koee jeeo |
lines.english: He is within - see Him outside as well; there is no one, other than Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲਤੌ ਠਾਕਿ ਰਖਹੁ ਘਰਿ ਅਪਨੈ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਇਹ ਮਤਿ ਹੋਈ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: chalatau tthaak rakhahu ghar apanai gur miliai ih mat hoee jeeo |
lines.english: Restrain your fickle mind, and keep it steady within its own home; meeting the Guru, this understanding is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਏਕ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮੋਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh ek drisatt kar dekhahu ghatt ghatt jot samoee jeeo |2|
lines.english: As Gurmukh, look upon all with the single eye of equality; in each and every heart, the Divine Light is contained. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਿ ਅਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੁ ਰਹਉ ਬਿਸਮਾਦੀ ਦੁਖੁ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dekh adrisatt rhau bisamaadee dukh bisarai sukh hoee jeeo |3|
lines.english: Seeing the unseen Lord, you shall be amazed and delighted; forgetting your pain, you shall be at peace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੀਵਹੁ ਅਪਿਉ ਪਰਮ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਹੋਈ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: peevahu apiau param sukh paaeeai nij ghar vaasaa hoee jeeo |
lines.english: Drinking in the ambrosial nectar, you shall attain the highest bliss, and dwell within the home of your own self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਭਵ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਗਾਈਐ ਪੁਨਰਪਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: janam maran bhav bhanjan gaaeeai punarap janam na hoee jeeo |4|
lines.english: So sing the Praises of the Lord, the Destroyer of the fear of birth and death, and you shall not be reincarnated again. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਬਾਈ ਸੋਹੰ ਭੇਦੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: tat niranjan jot sabaaee sohan bhed na koee jeeo |
lines.english: The essence, the immaculate Lord, the Light of all - I am He and He is me - there is no difference between us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਰੰਪਰ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸੋਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੫॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: aparanpar paarabraham paramesar naanak gur miliaa soee jeeo |5|11|
lines.english: The Infinite Transcendent Lord, the Supreme Lord God - Nanak has met with Him, the Guru. ||5||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 1 ghar 3 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, First Mehl, Third House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵੇ ਕਾ ਫਲੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: gaave kaa fal hoee |
lines.english: The rewards of singing His Praises

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵਾ ਤਦ ਹੀ ਗਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa tis bhaavaa tad hee gaavaa |
lines.english: When I am pleasing to Him, then I sing His Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਗਾਵੇ ਕਾ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: taa gaave kaa fal paavaa |
lines.english: Singing His Praises, I receive the fruits of my rewards.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਵੈ ਸੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaa aape devai soee |1|
lines.english: Are obtained when He Himself gives them. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਤੇ ਸਚ ਮਹਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: taa te sach meh rahiaa samaaee | rahaau |
lines.english: this is why I remain immersed in the True Name. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਾਖੀ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur saakhee antar jaagee |
lines.english: When I awoke within myself to the Guru's Teachings,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: man mere gur bachanee nidh paaee |
lines.english: O my mind, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the treasure is obtained;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਾਖੀ ਕਾ ਉਜੀਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur saakhee kaa ujeeaaraa |
lines.english: When the Light of the Guru's Teachings dawned,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਸਗਲ ਅੰਧੵਾਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: taa mittiaa sagal andhayaaraa |2|
lines.english: and then all darkness was dispelled. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਚੰਚਲ ਮਤਿ ਤਿਆਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: taa chanchal mat tiaagee |
lines.english: then I renounced my fickle intellect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਚਰਨੀ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur charanee man laagaa |
lines.english: When the mind is attached to the Guru's Feet,

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhai vich nirbhau paaeaa |
lines.english: Through the Fear of God, one attains the Fearless Lord;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਜਮ ਕਾ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਭਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: taa jam kaa maarag bhaagaa |
lines.english: then the Path of Death recedes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਸਹਜੈ ਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: taa sahajai kai ghar aaeaa |3|
lines.english: then, one enters the home of celestial bliss. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: eis jag meh karanee saaree |
lines.english: the most sublime action in this world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਣਤਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਬੂਝੈ ਕੋ ਬੀਚਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: bhanat naanak boojhai ko beechaaree |
lines.english: Prays Nanak, how rare are those who reflect and understand,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣੀ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: karanee keerat hoee |
lines.english: The noblest deed is to sing the Lord's Praises,

lines.translit: jaa aape miliaa soee |4|1|12|
lines.english: and so meet the Lord Himself. ||4||1||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 3 ghar 1 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Third Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕ ਸੇਵ ਕਰਹਿ ਸਭਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਜਿਨ ਸਬਦੈ ਸਾਦੁ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sevak sev kareh sabh teree jin sabadai saad aaeaa |
lines.english: All of Your servants, who relish the Word of Your Shabad, serve You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te niramal hoaa jin vichahu aap gavaaeaa |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, they become pure, eradicating self-conceit from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਨਿਤ ਸਾਚੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anadin gun gaaveh nit saache gur kai sabad suhaaeaa |1|
lines.english: Night and day, they continually sing the Glorious Praises of the True Lord; they are adorned with the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਹਮ ਬਾਰਿਕ ਸਰਣਿ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: mere tthaakur ham baarik saran tumaaree |
lines.english: O my Lord and Master, I am Your child; I seek Your Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਸਚਾ ਸਚੁ ਤੂ ਕੇਵਲੁ ਆਪਿ ਮੁਰਾਰੀ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: eko sachaa sach too keval aap muraaree | rahaau |
lines.english: You are the One and Only Lord, the Truest of the True; You Yourself are the Destroyer of ego. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਗਤ ਰਹੇ ਤਿਨੀ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਬਦੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaagat rahe tinee prabh paaeaa sabade haumai maaree |
lines.english: Those who remain wakeful obtain God; through the Word of the Shabad, they conquer their ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਰਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਉਦਾਸੀ ਗਿਆਨ ਤਤ ਬੀਚਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: girahee meh sadaa har jan udaasee giaan tat beechaaree |
lines.english: Immersed in family life, the Lord's humble servant ever remains detached; he reflects upon the essence of spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਉਰ ਧਾਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: satigur sev sadaa sukh paaeaa har raakhiaa ur dhaaree |2|
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, he finds eternal peace, and he keeps the Lord enshrined in his heart. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੂਆ ਦਹ ਦਿਸਿ ਧਾਵਦਾ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਖੁਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: eihu manooaa deh dis dhaavadaa doojai bhaae khuaaeaa |
lines.english: This mind wanders in the ten directions; it is consumed by the love of duality.
